title: rosa gallica var. calida
intro: Rosa gallica var. calida, also known as the French rose or Apothecary's rose, is a variety of the Rosa gallica species, a type of flowering plant in the rose family. The petals and leaves of this plant have been used in herbal medicine for centuries, valued for their astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rosa gallica var. calida include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. Rosa gallica var. calida can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, as well as being used in poultices and compresses to harness its medicinal properties.
